stem: Modern IDEs bundle several tools that help write and debug a program.
review_notes: Match the four IDE tools to their primary purpose. One distractor in the right column.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Match each IDE tool to its purpose.

right: Colours keywords and shows errors as you type
Translates the source code into something the computer can run
Pauses execution at breakpoints and inspects variables
Suggests function and variable names from the surrounding code
Encrypts files in a Git repository

mark_points.text: Editor — colours keywords / shows errors as you type
